posts.text: Hey there! It's Maruf Bin Murtuza, an infosec enthusiast from Bangladesh. I am currently doing my B.Sc in CSE from Brac University. I am a fan of technology, programming and finding security flaws. It's my passion to find system vulnerabilities. But don't think me as a nerd just because of my passion. I love to enjoy life outside cyberspace as well. So, I won't mind if you invite me to have a cup of coffee or... some spicy slices of pizza with you... 😉 To invite me for coffee or pizza, you can reach me via the following links: # Linkedin # Twitter # Discord # Facebook I just not only love to learn about cybersecurity,But love to teach about that as well.So, I write and make videos on various topics of cybersecurity.You can find them in the following links: # Blog# Youtube And, here are some links,Just in case you are interested about my ranks on different platforms: # Try Hack Me# Hack The Box# Cyber TalentsThat’s all about myself.Good Bye!Hoping a coffee invitaion from you soon… 😉
